headline: How Trump could use new AI chip export controls as 'leverage'
summary: Moor Insights & Strategy founder, CEO, and chief analyst Patrick Moorhead joins Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to discuss potential new artificial intelligence (AI) chip export regulations, explaining how they would cause global supply uncertainty and affect chipmakers like AMD (AMD) and Nvidia (NVDA). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: AMD AI Partnerships And Valuation Gap Put Growth Story In Focus
summary: Over the past week, Advanced Micro Devices (NasdaqGS:AMD) announced a multiyear mega deal with Meta Platforms to supply large scale AI compute infrastructure. AMD expanded US GPU manufacturing capacity through a collaboration with Flex to support domestic production of advanced chips. The company launched an AI research lab with the University of Toronto focused on next generation AI models and hardware co design. New partnerships with Nutanix and Wind River target open, high performance AI...

headline: Adeia Enters into Multi-Year IP License Agreement with AMD
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., March 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Adeia Inc. (Nasdaq: ADEA), the technology company known for developing foundational innovations that enable next-generation solutions for the semiconductor and media industries, today announced it has entered into a multi-year license agreement with Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) for access to Adeia’s comprehensive semiconductor intellectual property (IP) portfolio.
